statement.headerDoc:
STEP 3x-1 — Collatz-variant conjecture finite verification
  ==========================================================

  3x-1 map: T(n) = 3n-1 if odd, n/2 if even.
  Known cycles (empirical):
    A = {1, 2}                                        (length 2)
    B = {5, 7, 10, 14, 20}                            (length 5)
    C = {17, 25, 34, 37, 41, 50, 55, 61, 68, 74, 82,
         91, 110, 122, 136, 164, 182, 272}            (length 18)

  Conjecture: every positive integer eventually enters one of {A, B, C}.
  Status: OPEN. Empirical (Rei 2026-04-20): verified for n ≤ 10^5,
  basin distribu
